posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I would like to request monday.com team deactive my Workforms free account, due there nothing related option that let me do it.

I was working fine with monday.com form, after the marketing ad of Workforms I give it a try, but after that I noted that only let me have 100 submits, that is really not what I hope to get…just not works for me.

The problem is monday.com don’t leave an option that let us cancel that free account use, that mean after that my new forms will limited with 100 submissions monthly .

Please help me to resolve this so not friendly issue .
